overrides._README: Human-only status calls for the LLP dashboard. These ALWAYS win over the auto-derived value from build-llp-status.mjs. Keys = slug. Per slug set any of: id|fin|nac|edit|json|cine|img|geo|qa to done|draft|band|block|na, plus an optional note. Use 'draft' to mark a dimension whose bespoke content is staged in LLP-GENERATION.md but not yet written to Notion/HTML. Remove an entry once the auto value is correct on its own.
